resources.string: Could not disconnect authentication method without a backup method.
Please enter a valid E-Mail, that is not already associated with a habitica account.
Enjoy having fun getting things done
This is a unique name you can change later at any time!
You must be new here. I’m Justin, I’ll be your guide in Habitica.\n\nSo how would you like to look? Don’t worry, you can change this later.
Looking good! Now, choose any categories you’d like to work on and we’ll create a few tasks. We’ll go to your task board after this!

Your privacy is important to us. Habitica uses data from your device to analyze performance, handle support requests, and provide you with the best possible gamified experience. To do that, we need to request the following permissions.

You can change this at any time. To learn more, review our Privacy Policy.
This is used to improve the user experience, performance, and services of Habitica. Our support team will also use this when handling requests and bug reports.
This is necessary data required by our app to function. This includes data like your preferences saved in settings as well as crash information.

"Habitica uses data from your device to analyze performance, handle support requests, and provide you with the best possible gamified experience. To do that, we need to request the following permissions.\n\nYou can change these at any time from your account settings.
You\'ll be able to review upcoming charges before confirming your change in the next step
Subscriptions automatically renew until cancelled at the price of your newly selected plan.

Once we’ve confirmed your purchase, the payment will be charged 
to your Google Account.

Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renewal is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. If you have an active subscription, your account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of your current subscription period and you will be charged the same price you agree to pay above.

By continuing you accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
